meta.title: Deployment Pipelines and CI/CD
meta.excerpt: Setting up automated deployment pipelines, testing, and continuous integration for production deployments.

seo.metaDescription: Build reliable CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments.

blocks.content: Automated deployment pipelines ensure consistent, reliable releases with built-in testing and security checks.

blocks.title: Release Safety
blocks.content: Require green checks on all critical jobs before promoting to production.
GitHub Actions provides the CI/CD infrastructure for automated testing and deployment. The workflow is triggered on push to main and pull requests.

blocks.title: CI/CD Workflow Configuration
blocks.code:
name: CI/CD Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'pnpm'
      
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      
      - name: Run linting
        run: pnpm run lint
      
      - name: Run type checking
        run: pnpm run type-check
      
      - name: Run unit tests
        run: pnpm run test:unit
      
      - name: Run integration tests
        run: pnpm run test:integration
      
      - name: Build application
        run: pnpm run build

  deploy-staging:
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to Staging
        run: echo "Deploy to staging Vercel"

  deploy-production:
    needs: test
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to Production
        run: echo "Deploy to production Vercel"

features.title: Branch Protection
features.description: Require PR reviews and passing checks before merge

features.title: Security Scanning
features.description: Automated dependency and code vulnerability scanning

features.title: Quality Gates
features.description: Lint, type-check, and test coverage thresholds

features.title: Fast Feedback
features.description: Parallel job execution for quick CI results

blocks.content: Environment-specific configuration is managed through environment variables and secrets stored in GitHub and Vercel.

features.title: Development
features.description: Local environment with mock data and hot reload

features.title: Staging
features.description: Pre-production environment with real CMS data

features.title: Production
features.description: Live environment with full monitoring and backups

items: STRAPI_API_TOKEN - Authentication token for API access
SMTP_HOST, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS - Email service configuration

blocks.title: Secret Management
blocks.content: Never commit secrets to version control. Use GitHub Secrets for CI/CD and Vercel Environment Variables for runtime.
Different deployment strategies balance speed, safety, and rollback capability. Choose the strategy that matches your release requirements.

blocks.title: Blue-Green Deployment
blocks.content: Run two identical environments (blue and green), switch traffic instantly, enabling zero-downtime deployments

blocks.title: Canary Deployment
blocks.content: Gradually route a small percentage of traffic to new version, monitor metrics, then increase traffic if stable

blocks.title: Rolling Deployment
blocks.content: Update instances incrementally, maintaining partial availability during deployment, good for stateless apps

blocks.title: Vercel Preview Deployments
blocks.content: Every pull request automatically gets a preview URL for testing before merge, enabling safe code review.
When issues are detected in production, quick rollback procedures minimize downtime and user impact.

features.title: Instant Rollback
features.description: Vercel allows instant rollback to previous deployment via dashboard

features.title: Git Revert
features.description: Revert problematic commit and trigger new deployment

features.title: Database Migrations
features.description: Plan forward-compatible schemas to avoid migration rollbacks

features.title: Monitoring
features.description: Alert on error spikes to detect issues quickly

items: Identify the issue and confirm rollback is necessary
Locate the last known good deployment
Click 'Promote to Production' to instantly rollback
Verify the issue is resolved by checking monitoring
Create incident report and plan fix for next deployment

blocks.title: Database Schema Changes
blocks.content: Rollback of database migrations requires careful planning. Always make schemas forward-compatible to avoid data loss.

blocks.title: Git Rollback via Revert
blocks.code:
# Revert the problematic commit
git revert <commit-hash>

# Push to trigger new deployment
git push origin main

# Or: Reset to previous commit (destructive)
git reset --hard <previous-commit>
git push origin main --force
